_note: Per-lesson role-play scenario. Grounded in Pre-A1/007 dialogue + vocab. Learner plays Anna; computer plays Tom. Each NPC node offers 2-3 branches so the same lesson language can be reached different ways. Consumed by RP.Engine + RP.classifiers.local (see roleplay/).
title: 007 · My Family

routes.meaning: Anna asks who is in the picture.
routes.hint: Ask who they are: “Who is this?”

routes.meaning: Anna says it is a nice family.

partial.message: Ask about the family: “Who is this?”

off_topic.message: Tom shows his family! Say “Who is this?”

npc.text: Thank you! Look here. Do you know who they are?

partial.message: Ask who they are: “Who is this?”

off_topic.message: Look at the picture. Say “Who is this?”

npc.text: This is my mom and my dad.

routes.meaning: Anna asks if the little one is his baby sister.
routes.hint: Ask about the little one: “Is this your baby sister?”

routes.meaning: Anna asks who the little one is.
examples: And who is this little one?
routes.hint: You can ask “Is this your baby sister?”

partial.message: Ask about the baby: “Is this your baby sister?”

off_topic.message: That is his mom and dad! Say “Is this your baby sister?”

learning_objective: Say who is in your family

routes.meaning: Anna says she has a big brother.
examples: I have a big brother, too.
Me, I have a big brother.
routes.hint: Tell Tom about your family: “I have a big brother.”

routes.meaning: Anna says the baby is cute.
routes.hint: Nice! You can also say “I have a big brother.”

partial.message: Tell Tom about your family: “I have a big brother.”

off_topic.message: The baby is small! Say “I have a big brother.”

routes.meaning: Anna says she has a cat.
routes.hint: Say what pet you have: “Yes, I have a cat.”

routes.meaning: Anna says she does not have a pet.
routes.hint: You can say “Yes, I have a cat.”

partial.message: Tell Tom about your pet: “Yes, I have a cat.”

off_topic.message: Tom asked about pets. Say “Yes, I have a cat.”

npc.text: That is okay. Pets are fun!

routes.meaning: Anna says she wants a cat.

partial.message: Say what you want: “Yes, I want a cat.”

off_topic.message: Pets are fun! Say “Yes, I want a cat.”

routes.meaning: Anna agrees and says me too.
examples: Me too! I love my family.

off_topic.message: Tom loves his family. Say “Me too!”

npc.text: Family is the best. Thank you for looking!
